name: alew3 skills
description: A local-first marketplace repository for modular AI skill plugins. Each plugin can contain multiple independently callable skills plus an optional orchestrator skill.

plugins.name: Higgsfield + Seedance Video Suite
plugins.description: Modular AI image + video workflow: brief, image/character/character-sheet/environment/style/storyboard generation, Seedance 2 / Higgsfield video prompts, audio, passthrough validation, and handoff. Every skill is dual-mode (drives the Higgsfield MCP or emits paste-ready prompts), clarifies missing parameters first, and supports multiple characters and environments. Two orchestrators: image and video.
